market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Kalshi’s crypto perpetuals spark debate over whether they’re futures or swaps
articles.description: A clash between derivatives veterans is exposing a deeper discussion over how U.S. regulators should classify crypto perpetual contracts.

articles.title: The U.S. government is betting $2 Billion on quantum computing, and the defense side can't keep up
articles.description: Pruden argues that to defend against a quantum computer capable of cryptographically relevant operations, we need post-quantum cryptography and regulatory coordination that the industry has been deferring for years.

articles.title: FTX's Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal of criminal conviction on fraud, conspiracy charges
articles.description: The onetime FTX CEO did not persuade a panel of judges that his trial was unfair, the appeals court panel ruled Friday.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
articles.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

articles.title: XRP sentiment falls to 8-month low, and that has been a buy signal before
articles.description: Santiment's weighted sentiment gauge for XRP just hit its weakest reading since October 2025. The firm notes the token's strongest rebounds have tended to start when the crowd was this checked out.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
articles.description: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) falls 1% as index trades lower
articles.description: Cronos (CRO), down 1.4% from Thursday, was also an underperformer.

articles.title: KuCoin has not paid $2M award tied to delisted token dispute, investor says
articles.description: A Seychelles court said KuCoin can’t treat unwithdrawn tokens as “abandoned,” and awarded a Swiss investor over $2 million. He says the exchange still hasn’t paid and plans to sue again.

articles.title: Metaplanet to form securities arm through Siiibo acquisition
articles.description: Metaplanet will acquire Siiibo Securities and rename it Metaplanet Securities as it builds out Project Nova, its Bitcoin-centric finance strategy in Japan.

articles.title: US surveillance law to expire for first time after lawmakers reject Trump’s controversial pick to lead spy agencies
articles.description: The spy law known as Section 702, which authorizes the NSA and FBI's warrantless surveillance, will all but certainly expire on Friday for the first time.

articles.title: SpaceX tokenized IPO campaign draws $557M on Binance ahead of debut
articles.description: Crypto markets are becoming a new venue for pre-IPO price discovery ahead of SpaceX's highly anticipated debut today.

articles.title: For crypto, SpaceX's stock market debut could go either way
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for June 12, 2026

articles.title: Monero price rockets 33% to $438 amid $120 million onchain laundering maze
articles.description: Onchain sleuth ZachXBT traced remaining funds across exchanges, instant swap services and other blockchains. Tether later froze $72 million in USDT linked to the activity.

articles.title: Bitcoin miner 'capitulation' comes as trader sees later 2026 bear-market bottom
articles.description: Bitcoin miner metic sparked talk of "capitulation" as profit margins stayed under 5%, but the BTC price bear-market bottom remained absent.

articles.title: While bitcoin holds near $63,000, some data points to pain ahead for bulls
articles.description: Onchain data shows the bitcoin market price is only just above its realized price and demand is weakening, especially from ETFs.

articles.title: G7 高峰會將聚焦 AI 管理：OpenAI、Google 與 Anthropic 高層共襄盛舉
articles.description: 法國總統府公布名單，OpenAI、Google 與 Anthropic 等多位人工智慧高層將出席下週法國舉行的 […]

articles.title: SpaceX IPO update: Whale opens $22.3M SPCX long as synthetic price hits 30% premium
articles.description: SpaceX’s IPO hype may fuel a strong debut, but history shows richly valued listings often struggle after the first-day pop fades.

articles.title: 韓國混凝土運輸駕駛罷工，恐影響三星 SK 海力士擴廠進度
articles.description: 韓國媒體今天報導，由於韓國混凝土運輸駕駛正在進行大規模罷工，令人擔憂韓國半導體業兩巨頭三星電子和 SK 海力士 […]

articles.title: Metaplanet buys Siiibo Securities to accelerate bitcoin financial ecosystem plans
articles.description: The approximately $13.1 million acquisition gives Metaplanet a regulated securities platform to develop Bitcoin-linked investment products.
